---
title: "Duke Dowton Yonge R. N."
---

## Duke Dowton Yonge R. N.

**Dates:** (1840-1878)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

He was grandson of the Rev. Duke Yonge (1809-1846), Vicar of Antony, and son of the Rev. Duke John Yonge.  He (and ?three brothers) were living with their grandmother Cordelia (Colborne) Yonge at the time of the 1851 census.

### Letters

- Letter from December 1 [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
